languages.text: "Ты многое пережил. Довольно боли. Обещаю, я пощажу тебя — только отпусти заложника".

traits.locale_text: [Шагнуть ближе] "Ты многое пережил. Довольно боли. Обещаю, я пощажу тебя — только отпусти заложника".

languages.text: "You have endured a great deal. There will be no more suffering. I promise to spare you — just let the hostage go."
languages.original_text: "Ты многое пережил. Довольно боли. Обещаю, я пощажу тебя — только отпусти заложника".

traits.locale_text: "You have endured a great deal. There will be no more suffering. I promise to spare you — just let the hostage go."

languages.text: "Çok şey çektin. Artık acı çekmek yok. Seni bağışlayacağıma söz veriyorum. Rehineyi bırakman yeterli."
languages.original_text: "You have endured a great deal. There will be no more suffering. I promise to spare you — just let the hostage go."

traits.locale_text: "Çok şey çektin. Artık acı çekmek yok. Seni bağışlayacağıma söz veriyorum. Rehineyi bırakman yeterli."

languages.text: “你受了不少苦，现在苦难结束了。我保证饶你一命——放了人质。”
languages.original_text: "You have endured a great deal. There will be no more suffering. I promise to spare you — just let the hostage go."

traits.locale_text: “你受了不少苦，现在苦难结束了。我保证饶你一命——放了人质。”

languages.text: "Ihr musstet viel ertragen. Es wird kein weiteres Leid geben. Ich verspreche, Euch zu verschonen – aber lasst die Geisel gehen."
languages.original_text: "You have endured a great deal. There will be no more suffering. I promise to spare you — just let the hostage go."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr musstet viel ertragen. Es wird kein weiteres Leid geben. Ich verspreche, Euch zu verschonen – aber lasst die Geisel gehen."

languages.text: «Ya ha soportado mucho. No habrá más sufrimiento. Prometo perdonarla, pero tiene que dejar que el rehén se marche».
languages.original_text: "You have endured a great deal. There will be no more suffering. I promise to spare you — just let the hostage go."

traits.locale_text: «Ya ha soportado mucho. No habrá más sufrimiento. Prometo perdonarla, pero tiene que dejar que el rehén se marche».

languages.text: « Vous avez traversé une épreuve difficile. Inutile de causer davantage de souffrance. Je promets de vous épargner, à condition que vous relâchiez l'otage. »
languages.original_text: "You have endured a great deal. There will be no more suffering. I promise to spare you — just let the hostage go."

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez traversé une épreuve difficile. Inutile de causer davantage de souffrance. Je promets de vous épargner, à condition que vous relâchiez l'otage. »

languages.text: "あなたは多くのことに耐えてきた。これ以上の苦しみはない。人質を解放すればいい。
languages.original_text: "You have endured a great deal. There will be no more suffering. I promise to spare you — just let the hostage go."
